chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 4146 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.13/2017 (I Rule 10) 3. For hearing of main case 13.10.2022 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioner. Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The petitioner, vide order dated 26.11.1998, was appointed on contract basis for one year as „Trained Graduate Teacher‟ in Pakistan Water and Power Development Authority on certain terms and conditions including that “she should before reporting for duty, produce a certificate of medical fitness from the Medical Superintendent, WAPDA / one of the Medical Officers of WAPDA. If any Medical Officer WAPDA refers her to a Specialist for opinion or if she is required to obtain an X-Ray Electro Cardiogram, the cost of such consultation / service will be borne by her.” The petitioner served for three months, yet she failed to obtain „Certificate of Medical Fitness‟ from Medical Superintendent WAPDA and discontinued her services. Thereafter, after lapse of about 18 years, she filed instant petition on 01.10.2016 for her reinstatement in service. Being contract employee, the petitioner has no vested right for her reinstatement in service. It is an admitted position that she only served for three months and; thereafter, she did not continue her contract service. The instant petition also badly suffers from laches; hence, the same being devoid of merit and legal infirmity is dismissed accordingly along with listed application.
